source_name: Defence readiness and sensitive-data source gate
notes: No public source-safe readiness, mission-capable rate, live operational availability, munitions stockpile, classified basing or live posture metric is loaded. Do not infer readiness from asset counts or budget rows.
citation: Fuel Resilience AU defence alliances methodology, readiness source gate.

fields.boundary: This source gate intentionally carries no values. It exists to make the unavailable readiness boundary visible.
